## beehiiv subscriptions

Manage subscriptions for a publication

### Synopsis

Read, create, update, and remove Beehiiv subscriptions. This is one of the highest-traffic workflow groups in the CLI, so the help surface includes common lookup and mutation examples.

```
beehiiv subscriptions [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv subscriptions list --query limit=100 --all
beehiiv subscriptions get sub_123
beehiiv subscriptions find person@example.com
beehiiv subscriptions create --body '{"email":"person@example.com","reactivate_existing":false}'
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for subscriptions
```

```
      --api-key string          Override the Beehiiv API key
      --base-url string         Override the API base URL
      --compact                 Print compact JSON

      --publication-id string   Override the Beehiiv publication ID
      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit
      --raw                     Shorthand for --output raw
      --table                   Shorthand for --output table
      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
      --verbose                 Print request and response details to stderr
```
